welcome_message:
🚀Welcome to SERVER_NAME Marketplace!

This is the place to buy, sell, and connect with trusted members.

✅ Check the rules
✅ Verify
✅ Use the correct channels
✅ Stay respectful

Let’s build a safe and successful trading community together!

TICKET_PANEL.title: Ryuko Support • Create a Ticket
TICKET_PANEL.description: Welcome to Ryuko Support. To ensure your request is handled by the right specialist as quickly as possible, please select the most relevant category from the options listed below.

ticket_types.label: purchase
ticket_types.description: Ticket to purchase items that are not listed on the website
ticket_types.opening_embed_description: **🛒 Purchase Ticket Opened**  Hello! Thank you for opening a purchase ticket.  **Please fill out the information below so we can process your order fast:**  **Product / Service:**  **Quantity:**  **Variant / Color / License etc.:**   **Payment Method Preference:** (if you have one)  ---  I'm ready to pay immediately once you send me the total and payment details.  Just reply with the filled information above.

ticket_types.label: replace
ticket_types.description: Provide proof product doesn't work, invoice ID, payment proof & email used.
ticket_types.opening_embed_description:
**To process your replacement, please provide the following information. Make sure you have everything ready before the deadline.**
Mandatory Requirements:
 * **Product Invoice ID.**
 * **Full proof of payment.**
 * **Email you used for the payment.**

ticket_types.label: Support
ticket_types.opening_embed_description: **🛠️ Support Ticket Opened**  Hello! Thank you for opening a **Support** ticket.  Please let us know how we can help you today.  **Please reply with the following:**  • **Issue / Problem:**  • **What happened?**  • **Order Number / Username / Relevant Info:**  • **Any screenshots?** (optional but very helpful)  We will assist you as soon as possible.  Thank you! emoji::eorror~1:

ticket_types.label: Other
ticket_types.opening_embed_description: **❓ Other Ticket Opened**  Hello! Thank you for opening an **Other** ticket.  Please describe your request or issue in detail so we can help you as fast as possible.  **Please reply with the following:**  • **What do you need help with?**  • **More details / Explanation:**  • **Any screenshots or proof?** (if relevant)  We'll get back to you shortly.  Thank you!

ticket_types.label: Scam
ticket_types.description: If You Got Scammed By Someone In This  Server Choose This Category
ticket_types.opening_embed_description:
Send Discord user/id
Video or screenshot proof
